svg.text: 6 Main Tabs: Sessions, Taxonomy, Agents, Data, Runs, Settings
"Let me check the weather for you..."
"Keep reviewing to discover new failure modes"
Agent generates false or fabricated information
Incorrect tool selection or parameter usage
Agent loses track of conversation context
1. COLOR USAGE: Each tab has a designated accent (Sessions=coral, Taxonomy=plum, Agents=teal, Synthetic=gold)
2. DARK THEME: ink-950 (#14171c) base - consider eye comfort for extended use
3. INFORMATION DENSITY: Application shows lots of data - progressive disclosure recommended
4. GRID BACKGROUND: Subtle 24x24px grid pattern - may be distracting, consider alternatives
5. FONTS: Playfair Display (serif) for headings contrasts technical content
6. RESPONSIVE: Current design is desktop-focused (max 1800px) - mobile adaptation needed
7. ACCESSIBILITY: Color contrast and focus states need verification
• Better visual hierarchy and whitespace usage
• More distinctive loading states (skeleton screens matching content)
• Enhanced empty states with clearer call-to-actions
• Consistent spacing system (currently mixing various values)
